overview: NeoChain Digital Store is a cyberpunk-themed digital product storefront and earning platform for India and Nepal. Users can buy digital plans, earn daily rewards through tasks and spin wheel, refer friends for commissions, and manage withdrawals — all under strict anti-fraud and profit-first controls.
features: Digital product plans (₹1500–₹8000) with referral commissions
Complete earning system: daily tasks, spin wheel, login bonus
VIP membership tiers (Basic/Pro/Premium) with earning multipliers
Strict India & Nepal region control with VPN/proxy detection
Anti-fraud: device fingerprinting, auto-freeze, duplicate detection
Withdrawal safety gate: only processes if revenue exceeds payouts
Admin emergency controls: STOP button, reward adjustments, revenue dashboard
Data persistence across all version updates
